mapper.select: SELECT c.name, ROUND(SUM(oi.total_price), 2) AS value FROM order_item oi LEFT JOIN product p ON oi.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN orders o ON oi.order_no = o.order_no WHERE o.status IN (1, 2, 3) AND c.parent_id != 0 GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8
SELECT CASE status WHEN 0 THEN '待支付' WHEN 1 THEN '已支付' WHEN 2 THEN '已发货' WHEN 3 THEN '已完成' WHEN 4 THEN '已取消' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM orders GROUP BY status
